title: ‘Stand Up’: With One Maneuver, Trump Tries to Box In Democrats
author: Shawn McCreesh
fullText: President Trump turned his State of the Union address into full-blown political theater, handing out medals to war veterans and tossing the spotlight to ice hockey players.
summary: President Trump turned his State of the Union address into full-blown political theater, handing out medals to war veterans and tossing the spotlight to ice hockey players.
